display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🟢 GREEN: Open app, read file,
get system info, web search

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🟡 YELLOW: Install package,
modify user config, kill process

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔴 RED: Delete files, modify registry,
change network settings, sudo ops

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⛔ BLACK: Format disk, disable firewall,
modify boot config, delete system files
